betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6High-Speed Steel§f

§aProduce ultra-tough steel alloy for the most demanding tools.§f

§bHigh-Speed Steel§f (HSS) is a premium steel alloy used to create the toughest stamps, blades, and cutting tools. It is produced in a crucible and significantly outperforms standard steel.

§6Production§f:
Made in the §bCrucible§f:
§b• Steel§f + §bTungsten§f → §bHigh-Speed Steel§f

§6Uses§f:
§b• High-speed steel blades§f for the shredder (more durable)
§b• Advanced stamps§f for the press
§b• Premium cutting tools
§b• Advanced machine components

§6Properties§f:
§b• Durability§f: Significantly higher than steel
§b• Efficiency§f: Better yield when stamping or cutting
§b• Required§f: For many late-early-game machines

§eTip§f: HSS is a gateway material. It opens up more efficient ore processing and tougher tooling for your expanding factory.
